pi_items.source: Task description explicit instructions and verifier.py logic.
Task description states strict 2.0 MB file size limit (2.0 * 1024 * 1024 = 2097152).
Task description explicit instructions and verifier path checking.
setup_task.sh generates the template image at this path.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for vlc_media_player_env qa_screencast_recording_pipeline task by confirming that the task operates on a synthetically generated template image created by setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected output file path ('/home/ga/Videos/qa_reports/jira_attachment_bug_1044.mp4'), the expected frame rate (10 fps), the max size limit of 2.0 MB (2097152 bytes), and the template image path ('/home/ga/Pictures/bug_reference_ui.png') perfectly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description and the python script embedded in setup_task.sh.
